summary: Comprehensive testing of Estate Readiness Score Algorithm feature. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend dashboard correctly displays real-time readiness breakdown (docs %, messages %, checklist %). Beneficiary form includes DOB and Gender fields. New estates receive 30 default checklist items.
passed_tests: GET /api/estate/{estate_id}/readiness returns detailed breakdown with documents, messages, checklist scores
Document score based on 5 required legal documents (Will, Trust, Financial PoA, Medical PoA, Healthcare Directive)
Beneficiary creation stores date_of_birth and gender fields
Readiness score updates when beneficiaries are added
New estates get 30 default checklist items via ensure_default_checklist
Checklist score requires 25+ items for full completion
Messages score based on beneficiary demographics (age/relation milestones)
Toggle checklist items updates readiness score
Readiness breakdown persisted to estate document
Dashboard displays real readiness breakdown (40% Docs, 100% Messages, 28% Checklist for test estate)
Dashboard shows overall readiness score (56%) with Fair label
Beneficiary form has Date of Birth field (data-testid='beneficiary-dob-input')
Beneficiary form can be filled with DOB and Gender values
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns for readiness calculation functions
update_estate_readiness correctly calls calculate_estate_readiness for consistent scoring
DEFAULT_CHECKLIST_ITEMS has 30 items as required (verified in ensure_default_checklist)

test_credentials.otp: Get from logs: tail -n 5 /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log | grep -oP 'OTP for.*: \K\d+' | tail -1

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data. Created and cleaned up test beneficiaries and estates during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Estate Readiness Score algorithm fully implemented and tested. Readiness score is average of 3 sub-scores: documents (5 required legal docs), messages (based on beneficiary milestones), checklist (25+ items required). All CRUD operations trigger update_estate_readiness to recalculate scores. Frontend fetches GET /api/estate/{id}/readiness and displays breakdown. Test estate ID: a515f3ea-388a-408c-8c45-3545d4a0cf29

readiness_algorithm.checklist_score: PASS - Requires 25+ items, calculates completion percentage
readiness_algorithm.overall_score: PASS - Average of documents, messages, checklist scores

new_fields.beneficiary_gender: PASS - gender field in Beneficiary model and BeneficiaryCreate schema
